points.text: Fever is a common symptom of COVID-19. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Cough, often dry, is frequently reported. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Loss of smell (anosmia) is a typical early sign. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Loss of taste (ageusia) often accompanies loss of smell. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Fatigue is frequently experienced by patients. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
Breathing difficulties or shortness of breath may develop. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
Congestion, runny nose, or sore throat (common cold symptoms) [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002]
Digestive issues: upset stomach, vomiting, or diarrhea [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002]
Headaches and body or muscle aches [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002]
The most common COVID-19 symptoms are fever, cough, and tiredness. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
